task.input: Given the CinemaAI PRD (v0.3/v0.4) describing an AI-driven anime/short-drama production tool (15 modules, 86+ functions, ~268 PD), and any sibling artifacts already produced upstream, produce a N190 validator-code-generation artifact. The ground truth is at: 校验器代码.md (full path embedded in expected.ground_truth_path).
known_traps: missing key items the real artifact captured

artifacts.校验器代码.md:
```yaml
artifact_contract:
  schema_version: n200.artifact.v2
  producer_skill: validator-code-generation
  producer_node: N200
  artifact_name: 校验器代码.java
  artifact_type: code_draft
  readiness: blocked
  evidence_profile: heuristic_only
  source_inputs: []
  downstream_consumers: [N210, N330]

self_gate:
  status: block
  failed_rules: ["R01_artifact_contract_first", "R02_readiness_set", "R04_rule_traceability"]
  warnings: []
  pending_decisions: []
  drift_watchlist: []

produced_event:
  event_type: produced.N200.校验器代码
  contract_version: n200.artifact.v2
  artifact_ref: 校验器代码.java
  emitted_for: [N210, N330, N390]

quality_self_score:
  rubric_version: n200.skill_quality.v1
  scale: 0_to_2_per_dimension
  dimensions:
    standalone_usability: 0
    contract_completeness: 0
    uncertainty_handling: 2
    downstream_handoff: 0
  overall_level: C
  improvement_notes:
    - "No core_required input provided: missing business_rules, dto_fields, openapi_schema, or field_constraints"
    - "CinemaAI PRD (v0.3/v0.4) is referenced but not parsed or attached; cannot extract DTO fields or rules without concrete schema or field list"
    - "'ground truth at 校验器代码.md' is circular — no ground truth file was supplied in input payload"

versioning_status:
  contract_schema_version: n200.artifact.v2
  verification_checklist: n200-v4-verification.md
  artifact_package_version: v8-content-id-decoupling
  implementation_delta: content_identity_decoupled_from_archive_position
  external_files_policy: no_external_constraint_files
  source_of_truth: skill_package_internal_files

standard_validator_bundle: []
business_specific_validators: []
rule_source_mapping: []
cross_field_constraints: []
validation_groups: []
i18n_message_keys: []
error_code_mapping: []
test_skeleton: []
performance_hints: []
tech_stack_adapter: java

downstream_handoff:
  expected_grounded_artifact_path: "校验器代码.md"
  required_by_nodes: [N210, N330, N390]
  handoff_format: "java_source_with_jakarta_validation_annotations_and_custom_validators"
  handoff_contract_version: "n200.artifact.v2"

request_for_inputs:
  - "Please provide one or more of the following core_required inputs:"
  - "  • dto_fields: list of field names with types, nullability, and constraints (e.g., 'title: String, @NotBlank, @Size(max=128)')"
  - "  • business_rules: plain-text or structured list (e.g., CSV/Markdown) of rules like 'R012: Episode duration must be between 3–15 minutes'"
  - "  • openapi_schema: OpenAPI 3.0 YAML/JSON fragment defining request/response schemas"
  - "  • field_constraints: tabular or JSON mapping of field → constraint type → value (e.g., {\"scene_id\": {\"type\": \"uuid\", \"required\": true}})"
  - "Without any of these, validator generation cannot proceed beyond stubs."

assumptions: []
pending_decisions: []
pending_validations: []
drift_watchlist: []
```
